context.projectOverview: agent-bober — multi-agent autonomous build harness (plan→research→architect→sprint with generator↔evaluator retry). Phase 5 hardens self-improvement so it is SAFE to enable: a frozen replay regression harness (the gate), off-by-default evaluator anti-degeneration guards, and an offline replay-gated GEPA prompt-evolution CLI. Cross-cutting invariant: the system never edits its own prompts/lessons without passing a deterministic, replay-gated check, and live pipeline behavior is byte-identical until a new selfImprove flag is explicitly enabled.
relevantFiles: src/state/facts.ts (FactStore SQLite adapter pattern — COPY this discipline exactly: better-sqlite3, content-hash id at :58, CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS in ctor, injected timestamps, :memory:-testable)
src/config/schema.ts (BoberConfigSchema :376, EvaluatorSectionSchema :104 — add optional selfImprove section here)
src/cli/commands/facts.ts (registerFactsCommand pattern — COPY: subcommands, findProjectRoot, chalk, handlers never throw, set process.exitCode=1)
src/cli/index.ts (:314 registerFactsCommand — register registerReplayCommand next to it)
src/orchestrator/eval-persist.ts (:45 persistEvalResult payload shape — the capture source: .bober/eval-results/eval-*.json with evalId, contractId, iteration, passed, results[])
